parameters.query:
INSERT INTO clients (full_name, email, phone, preferred_channel, consent_data_processing, updated_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.full_name.replace(/\'/g, "''") }}',
  {{ $json.email ? "'" + $json.email.replace(/\'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.phone ? "'" + $json.phone.replace(/\'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $json.preferred_channel.replace(/\'/g, "''") }}',
  TRUE,
  NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (email) DO UPDATE
SET
  full_name = EXCLUDED.full_name,
  phone = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.phone, clients.phone),
  preferred_channel = EXCLUDED.preferred_channel,
  consent_data_processing = TRUE,
  updated_at = NOW()
RETURNING id, full_name, email, phone;

INSERT INTO cases (client_id, matter_type, status, priority, summary, assigned_lawyer, opened_at)
VALUES (
  {{ $('Upsert Cliente').item.json.id }},
  '{{ $('Normalizar Payload').item.json.matter_type.replace(/\'/g, "''") }}',
  'nuevo',
  '{{ $('Normalizar Payload').item.json.priority }}',
  '{{ $('Normalizar Payload').item.json.summary.replace(/\'/g, "''") }}',
  NULL,
  NOW()
)
RETURNING id, client_id, matter_type, status, priority, summary, opened_at;

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { status: 'ok', case_id: $('Insert Caso').item.json.id, client_id: $('Insert Caso').item.json.client_id, priority: $('Insert Caso').item.json.priority, next_step: 'asignar_abogado' } }}
